title: viola × greenei
intro: Viola × greenei, also known as the Greene's violet, is a rare, hybrid species of the viola plant family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × greenei include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Viola × greenei can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
